title: Glass Table Widget Configuration
description: Glass Table Widget Configuration (`content`) is an array of JSON structures that contains all of the attributes needed to render the glass table. Each element of the array represents one glass table widget, and the attributes of the element are parsed into a glass table BaseWidgetViewManager object.

attributes.name: search
attributes.label: search
attributes.description: The search to power the widget.

attributes.name: labelVal
attributes.label: labelVal
attributes.description: The text to show in the label located beneath the widget.

attributes.name: labelFlag
attributes.label: labelFlag
attributes.description: True if labelVal is to be shown with the widget, false otherwise.

attributes.name: vizType
attributes.label: vizType
attributes.description: Numeric indication of which visualization type the widget is - SingleValue, Gauge, Sparkline, SVD from 0-3, respectively

attributes.name: threshold_field
attributes.label: threshold_field
attributes.description: Field in data to which thresholds apply.

attributes.name: threshold_comparator
attributes.label: threshold_comparator
attributes.description: Comparator used for threshold severity computation

attributes.name: threshold_values
attributes.label: threshold_values
attributes.description: Array of values to indicate the bounds of the thresholds set for the widget.

attributes.name: threshold_labels
attributes.label: threshold_labels
attributes.description: Array of labels to match the threshold values set for the widget.

attributes.name: context_id
attributes.label: context_id
attributes.description: Id of service to which the widget's KPI belongs.

attributes.name: kpi_id
attributes.label: kpi_id
attributes.description: Id of KPI the widget represents

attributes.name: searchSource
attributes.label: searchSource
attributes.description: Source of search for glass table widget - can be datamodel or ad hoc.

attributes.name: dataModelSpecification
attributes.label: dataModelSpecification
attributes.description: Data model specification for the datamodel search.

attributes.name: dataModelStatOp
attributes.label: dataModelStatOp
attributes.description: Datamodel stats operation for the datamodel search.

attributes.name: dataModelWhereClause
attributes.label: dataModelWhereClause
attributes.description: Datamodel where clause for the datamodel search.

attributes.name: threshold_eval
attributes.label: threshold_eval
attributes.description: Threshold eval search clause for threshold severity evaluation.

attributes.name: aggregate_eval
attributes.label: aggregate_eval
attributes.description: Aggregate eval search clause for threshold severity evaluation.

attributes.name: base_search
attributes.label: base_search
attributes.description: Base search of the KPI the widget represents.

attributes.name: search_alert_earliest
attributes.label: search_alert_earliest
attributes.description: Earliest time for the search that powers the widget.

attributes.name: entities
attributes.label: entities
attributes.description: List of entities that the widget's KPI contains.

attributes.name: search_aggregate
attributes.label: search_aggregate
attributes.description: Aggregate search of the KPI the widget represents.

attributes.name: search_time_series_aggregate
attributes.label: search_time_series_aggregate
attributes.description: Time series search of the KPI the widget represents

attributes.name: search_time_compare
attributes.label: search_time_compare
attributes.description: Compare time series search of the KPI the widget represents (for the SVD viz type).

attributes.name: search_type
attributes.label: search_type
attributes.description: Type of search the widget is powered by. Must match one of the search_\* attributes of the widget.

attributes.name: relativeEarliest
attributes.label: relativeEarliest
attributes.description: Earliest time (in relative units) for the search that powers the widget.

attributes.name: defaultWidth
attributes.label: defaultWidth
attributes.description: Initial width to use for the widget.

attributes.name: defaultHeight
attributes.label: defaultHeight
attributes.description: Initial height to use for the widget.

attributes.name: existingKPI
attributes.label: existingKPI
attributes.description: True if KPI exists in user's system, false otherwise.

attributes.name: alert_on
attributes.label: alert_on
attributes.description: Threshold alert type (aggregate or entities) of the KPI the widget represents.

attributes.name: isThresholdEnabled
attributes.label: isThresholdEnabled
attributes.description: True if thresholds should be applied to the widget's search results, false otherwise.

attributes.name: useKPISummary
attributes.label: useKPISummary
attributes.description: true if widget uses the kpi_summary_index to power its search, false otherwise.

attributes.name: unit
attributes.label: unit
attributes.description: Unit string for widget to display.

attributes.name: gap_severity
attributes.label: gap_severity
attributes.description: Gap severity value of the KPI the widget represents.

attributes.name: gap_severity_color
attributes.label: gap_severity_color
attributes.description: Gap severity color of the KPI the widget represents.

attributes.name: drilldownSettingsModel
attributes.label: drilldownSettingsModel
attributes.description: Model to hold properties required for generating URLs for custom drilldown.

attributes.name: useCustomDrilldown
attributes.label: useCustomDrilldown
attributes.description: True if widget has custom drilldown turned on, false otherwise.

attributes.name: object_type
attributes.label: object_type
attributes.description: Name of the object type.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _owner
attributes.label: _owner
attributes.description: Splunk user `nobody`.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
